svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WdLmlmQcixKolKTrMWd-"> <mxGraphModel dx="1780" dy="928" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12
skinparam component {
 BackgroundColor #EAF4FB
 BorderColor #2E75B6
 FontSize 12
}
skinparam package {
 BackgroundColor #F8FBFE
 BorderColor #1F4E79
 FontStyle bold
}
skinparam database {
 BackgroundColor #FFF9C4
 BorderColor #F57F17
}
skinparam cloud {
 BackgroundColor #F3E5F5
 BorderColor #7B1FA2
}
skinparam ArrowColor #1F4E79
skinparam ArrowFontSize 10
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam note {
 BackgroundColor #FFFDE7
 BorderColor #F9A825
}

title Parallel Web Crawler — Component Diagram\n(Three-Layer Architecture)

' ─── Layer 1: Presentation ────────────────────────────────────────
package \"Layer 1: Presentation (JavaFX GUI)\" #EAF4FB {
 [CrawlerApp\n<<JavaFX Entry>>] as App
 [MainController\n<<Event Handling\n+ Stats + Benchmark>>] as MC
 [MainView.fxml\n<<UI Layout>>] as FXML
 [dark-theme.css\n<<Styling>>] as CSS

 App -down-> MC : loads FXML
 FXML .right.> MC : bound via @FXML
 CSS .right.> FXML : styles
}

' ─── Layer 2: Core Engine ─────────────────────────────────────────
package \"Layer 2: Core Engine (Parallel)\" #E8F5E9 {
 [CrawlerEngine\n<<Parallel Orchestrator>>] as CE

 package \"Thread Pool\" #C8E6C9 {
 [ExecutorService\n<<FixedThreadPool>>] as EXE
 [Worker Thread 1] as W1
 [Worker Thread 2] as W2
 [Worker Thread N] as WN
 EXE --> W1
 EXE --> W2
 EXE --> WN
 }

 package \"Shared State (Thread-Safe)\" #DCEDC8 {
 [BlockingQueue\n<<URL Work Queue>>] as BQ
 [ConcurrentHashMap\n<<Visited URL Set>>] as CH
 [AtomicInteger\n<<Page Counter>>] as AI
 [AtomicBoolean\n<<Stop Flag>>] as AB
 }

 CE --> EXE : submits Callable tasks
 CE --> BQ : drainTo (batch) / offer (new URLs)
 W1 --> CH : visitedUrls.add() [atomic]
 W2 --> CH : visitedUrls.add() [atomic]
 WN --> CH : visitedUrls.add() [atomic]
 W1 --> BQ : queue.offer() [new URLs]
 W2 --> BQ : queue.offer() [new URLs]
 W1 --> AI : incrementAndGet()
 CE --> AB : stopped.get() / set()
}

' ─── Layer 3: Data ────────────────────────────────────────────────
package \"Layer 3: Data\" {

 package \"Model\" #FFF9C4 {
 [CrawlerConfig\n<<Builder Pattern>>] as CFG
 [CrawledPage\n<<Result Data>>] as CP
 }

 package \"Storage Writers (Concurrent)\" #FFECB3 {
 [CsvStorage\n<<synchronized>>] as CSV
 [JsonStorage\n<<synchronized>>] as JSON
 [SqliteStorage\n<<synchronized\n+ batch insert>>] as DB
 }
}

' ─── Output Files ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
database \"output/ folder\" {
 [crawled_pages.csv] as FCSV
 [crawled_pages.json\ncrawled_pages_summary.json] as FJSON
 [crawled_pages.db\n(pages + links tables)] as FDB
}

' ─── External ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cloud \"Internet\n(Target Websites)\" {
 [Web Servers] as WS
}

' ─── Connections between layers ──────────────────────────────────
MC --> CE : creates, configures, starts/stops
CE --> CFG : reads settings
CE --> CP : creates per crawled page
CE --> CSV : saveAndNotify()
CE --> JSON : saveAndNotify()
CE --> DB : saveAndNotify()

W1 --> WS : HTTP GET (parallel)
W2 --> WS : HTTP GET (parallel)
WN --> WS : HTTP GET (parallel)

CSV --> FCSV : writes rows
JSON --> FJSON : writes NDJSON
DB --> FDB : writes to tables

note bottom of EXE
 All N threads send HTTP requests
 SIMULTANEOUSLY.
 This is where
 the speedup comes from.
end note

note right of CH
 Lock-free dedup:
 Two threads can call add()
 at the same time safely.
 Only ONE gets true (new URL).
end note
@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="HDwSmDTa_OjxVkMHbnbk-6"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="901" width="1635" x="270" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
